given: Sentry Cursor integration verifies an API key created for a Cursor service account

should_find.finding: verify_api_key only relies on the /v0/me endpoint, which fails for Cursor service account keys and prevents valid service accounts from setting up the integration

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 652324b48217e89f4267bfc1bb6e5e390818c277. verify_api_key only relies on the /v0/me endpoint, which fails for Cursor service account keys and prevents valid service accounts from setting up the integration
